import React from 'react'; import { useAuth } from '../../context/AuthContext'; import Navbar from '../../components/Navbar'; import Footer from '../../components/Footer'; import './Dashboard.css'; const Dashboard = () => { const { user } = useAuth(); return (

Welcome, {user?.name}! 👋

{/* Profile Card */}

Profile Information

Name: {user?.name}
Email: {user?.email}
Phone: {user?.phone || 'Not provided'}
Role: {user?.role}
{/* Quick Actions */}

Quick Actions

{/* Stats */}

Your Statistics

0
Favorites
0
Scheduled Visits
0
Messages
); }; export default Dashboard;
